description: Proprietary fruit genetics and licensing company with a major table grape program and additional stone-fruit variety activity.
Fruit-breeding company known for proprietary table grape and cherry varieties, including globally licensed branded grape programs.
Table grape breeding and licensing group with international variety commercialization activity.
Global berry company with proprietary strawberry, raspberry, blackberry, and blueberry breeding programs licensed through approved growers.
Berry variety and marketing group associated with proprietary berry genetics, especially berries for international fresh markets.
Blueberry breeding and nursery company supplying proprietary blueberry varieties and plants to growers globally.
Family fruit-breeding program known for patented stone-fruit varieties and interspecific hybrids including plum, apricot, peach, nectarine, and cherry genetics.
Berry breeding, nursery, and genetics business with strawberry and other berry variety development activity.
University of Florida-affiliated intellectual property and seed/plant licensing organization for Florida-developed crop varieties.
Netherlands-based fruit-breeding company focused on strawberry and apple variety development and licensing.
New Zealand-based apple and pear variety commercialization company connected to international pipfruit breeding and licensing.
International berry and specialty crop breeding and nursery group with programs in strawberries, raspberries, blueberries, blackberries, garlic, asparagus, avocado, and cherry.
Berry business associated with proprietary blueberry and berry variety development, commercialization, and international production programs.
Public university agricultural research system with fruit, citrus, vegetable, and berry breeding programs whose varieties may be licensed through affiliated entities.
